(404/MAS) ED LAU AND KEN WONG (ASSOCIATE) WITH PET. RESP IN PRO PER. NORAH UYEDA, COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER. PET AND RESP SWORN AND TESTIFIED. FOLLOWING EXHIBITS F
OR PET MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION: #1 & #2 (AUTHORITY TO WITHDRAW CASH VALUE OF LIFE INS. FOR PAUL HU AND FOR JING LI RESPECTIVELY) AND #3 (SUMMARY OF
AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, COURT SHALL NOT ORDER S/S TO PET FROM RESP. COURT TERMINATES JURISDICTION TO ORDER S/S TO PET FROM THIS DAY FORWARD.
TION AND SHOW PET'S ABILITY TO PAY S/S. COURT DETERMINES THAT $5,000 WAS RECEIVED BY PET AS INHERITANCE AND AS HIS SEPARATE PROPERTY. AS NEITHER PARTY
E. COURT CREDITS PET FOR RECEIPT OF $7,000 COMMUNITY PROPERTY ASSETS FOR PARTIES' "CLASS B SECURITIES" HELD IN CHINA. COURT CREDITS RESP FOR RECEIPT
OOF TO BE RECEIVED BY THIS COURT WITHIN 60 DAYS AS TO EXACT AMOUNT. IT SHALL BE PET'S RESPONSIBILITY TO PROVIDE PROOF TO COURT OF AMOUNT IN SAVINGS
TIES AGREE OTHERWISE WITHIN 60 DAYS, HOUSE WILL BE PLACED ON THE MARKET. IF ONE PARTY DOES NOT COOPERATE WITH SALE PROCESS, OTHER PARTY MAY COME EX
ENT FUNDS TO BUY OUT THE OTHER PERSON AT THAT FAIR MARKET VALUE OR HAVE FIRST RIGHT OF REFUSAL. BUY OUT AMOUNT TO BE ADJUSTED BY COURT'S DETERMINATION
EW. PET MAY APPEAR BY COUNSEL. COURT STRONGLY SUGGESTS RESP TO SEEK LEGAL COUNSEL FOR ASSISTANCE. PET TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AND ORDER. PET TO PREPARE
